response.global_analysis: 1. Audio analysis: A short spoken intro line is present at 00:00 - 00:02. The rest of the video consists of instrumental background music without any vocals. 2. Visual events: Prominent announcements, attention notices, and merchandise lists displayed on screen are subtitled to ensure accessibility during the pre-show loop. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed carefully to match the slide transitions and the initial spoken voice.
